title: melica mollis
intro: Melica mollis, also known as meadow melick or melick, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Melica mollis include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
